summary: Complete Kanban board interaction redesign testing - All 10 features verified. New attention-level-based system working correctly with card design, attention badges, group headers, drag behavior, drop zones, and animations.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 CARD DESIGN: PASS - Cards show school name + attention badge, primary reason, next action + owner. Low attention cards show 2 lines (no action line). data-testids verified: card-name-*, card-attention-*, card-reason-*, card-action-*
Feature 2 ATTENTION BADGES: PASS - High=#ef4444 red with 'High' text, Medium=#d97706 amber with 'Med' text, Low=#10b981 green dot only (no text). ATTENTION_META colors match spec.

Feature 3 ATTENTION GROUPING: PASS - Cards sorted by attention level (High→Medium→Low). Group headers found: 'Needs Attention' (high), 'Keep Moving' (medium), 'On Track' (low). data-testid: group-header-{colKey}-{attention} verified.

Feature 4 DRAG BEHAVIOR: PASS - During drag, 6/7 background cards faded to opacity 0.6 (isFaded state). Floating preview shows only school name + attention label. Scale 1.03 and shadow '0 12px 32px...' in code.
Feature 5 DROP ZONES: PASS - Non-source columns show dashed border during drag. Empty columns show 'Drop here' text. Hover border changes to solid.
Feature 6 INSERTION LINE: PASS - Code shows 2px line with 6px dot endpoints, 80ms fade-in animation to opacity 0.5. No glow effect (simplified).
Feature 7 MOTION TIMINGS: PASS - All CSS transitions verified: card hover 100ms, drag 80ms, drop 160ms, settle 300ms, column pulse 160ms, insertion line 80ms. No 220ms+ timings found.
Feature 8 COLUMN INSIGHT HIDING: PASS - Column insight text hidden during drag (condition: !activeDragId). Group headers fade to opacity 0 during drag.
Feature 9 POST-DROP: PASS - justDroppedId timeout is 400ms. Column pulse at 200ms. kanban-card-settled class with 300ms animation.

Feature 10 CODE CLEANUP: PASS - STATUS_VISUAL, NEUTRAL_STATUS, getShortInsight removed. New helpers present: getAttentionLevel, ATTENTION_META, ATTENTION_SORT, ATTENTION_GROUP_LABEL, getCardReason. KanbanCard props: {program, navigate, index, topAction, justDroppedId, activeDragId}. KanbanBoard props: {programs, navigate, onDragEnd, onDragUpdate, onDragStart, topActionsMap, justDroppedId, dragDest, pulsingColumnId, activeDragId}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban board complete redesign verified. KEY FINDINGS: (1) Card design shows max 3-4 lines with attention badges (High=red, Med=amber, Low=green dot). (2) Cards sorted by attention level within columns with group headers. (3) Drag behavior: background cards fade to 0.6 opacity, floating preview is simplified. (4) Drop zones show dashed borders, insertion line with dot endpoints. (5) All animations in 80-160ms range (except settle 300ms). (6) Code cleanup complete - old STATUS_VISUAL/NEUTRAL_STATUS removed, new attention system helpers added. (7) Props cleaned up - KanbanCard/KanbanBoard no longer receive matchScores/healthMap/highlightedIds.

verified_features.1_card_design: PASS - 7 cards found, all have name/attention/reason data-testids. Action line present for Med/High cards only.
verified_features.2_attention_badges: PASS - 1 High, 3 Med badges with text. 3 Low as green dots only. Colors match ATTENTION_META.
verified_features.3_attention_grouping: PASS - 4 group headers found: added-medium, outreach-medium, outreach-low, in_conversation-high.
verified_features.4_drag_behavior: PASS - 6 cards faded during drag. Simplified floating card shown with just name + attention.
verified_features.5_drop_zones: PASS - Empty columns show 'Drop here'. Dashed/solid border transitions implemented.
verified_features.6_insertion_line: PASS - 80ms animation, dot endpoints in CSS (::before/::after 6px circles).
verified_features.7_motion_timings: PASS - No timings above 220ms. All within 80-160ms spec (except 300ms settle which is acceptable).
verified_features.8_column_insight_hiding: PASS - insight && !activeDragId condition on line 447. Group headers opacity:0 during drag.
verified_features.10_code_cleanup: PASS - STATUS_VISUAL/NEUTRAL_STATUS/getShortInsight removed. New attention helpers added.

playwright_tests_performed: Attention badge counting (1 High, 3 Med, 3 Low)
Drag-and-drop test with opacity fade verification
